attributes.description: Alerts when connection errors exceed 5 in the window. Auth, host-cache, or network issues.
attributes.name: [MySQL OTel] High connection error rate

investigation_guide.blob:
## MySQL high connection error rate

### What fired
`INCREASE(mysql.connection.errors) > 5` in the window.

### Why it matters
MySQL tracks connection errors by type (max_connections, accept, select, etc.). Any sustained rate indicates clients cannot connect reliably.

### Triage
1. Split by `attributes.error` to categorise.
2. Check `max_connections` utilisation.
3. Inspect host cache / DNS.

### Remediation
- Raise `max_connections`.
- Fix DNS / auth.

### Tuning
- 5/window threshold; tune to baseline.

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-mysqlreceiver.otel-*
// Connection errors are a monotonic counter; use INCREASE for delta over the time window
| WHERE metrics.mysql.connection.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS increase = SUM(INCREASE(metrics.mysql.connection.errors))
  BY resource.attributes.mysql.instance.endpoint, attributes.error
// Alert when more than 5 connection errors in the window; adjust threshold as needed
| WHERE increase > 5
| SORT increase DESC
